what-is-done.item: mod_Config fixed and operational with all constants, properties, and document types
25 sheets merged from OLD Master and NEW Fixed workbooks
29 VBA modules present and compiled with 0 broken references
All module code exported to C:\Users\ADMINI~1\AppData\Local\Temp\VBA_Export\ for analysis
Full module intelligence map completed (procedures, variables, dependencies, sheet access)
Sheet-to-code topology mapped (25 sheets x 29 modules)
Call graph reconstructed with entry points and dependency chains
4 XML context files generated and saved to workbook directory
Smoke test passed: workbook opens, mod_Config loads, all references valid
Dead code identified: Module1, Module2, mod_Config_Test (safe to delete)

what-is-known.fact: The workbook is a pure VBA Decision Support System for public sector stock management
Thesis ground truth: D=1546, ROP=205.6, SS=200, Q*=176, LT=2 (Toner G030 case study)
Institution: Directorate of Education, El Bayadh, Algeria
Compliance: CNEPD BTS Public Sector Standards
Architecture: Offline-first, zero external dependencies (no Python, Flask, JSON, SQL)
Transaction flow: Form -> mod_Database (write MOUVEMENTS) -> mod_SyncBridge (update ARTICLES) -> mod_AuditTrail (log) -> mod_ExportEngine (PDF)
mod_SheetSetup has a local duplicate MASTER_PWD constant that should reference mod_Config
mod_Budget references non-existent "BUDGET" sheet - all budget functions will fail
mod_StockCalculations references "StockLedger" sheet which may not exist
mod_SyncBridge has 4 stub functions (lines 136-138) that return hardcoded values
No Workbook_Open event handler exists in ThisWorkbook module
frmStockEntry UserForm exists but was not exported (only .bas/.frm files were requested)
System_Lists sheet is VeryHidden (xlSheetVeryHidden) in the source workbook

what-is-uncertain.uncertainty: ThisWorkbook module content not fully analyzed - unknown if Workbook_Open, Workbook_BeforeSave, or other event handlers exist
frmStockEntry UserForm code not exported - form logic, control names, and event handlers unknown
Named ranges inventory incomplete - some modules reference ranges (BL_CurrentCounter, FACT_CurrentCounter) that may or may not exist
mod_SyncBridge.RestoreMasterLedger referenced in mod_UI_Setup but not found in exported modules
The blank sheet (index 18) in OLD Master - purpose and content unknown
Approval workflow columns in MOUVEMENTS sheet - whether they exist and their exact names
ListObject/Table usage - whether sheets use structured tables or raw ranges
Ribbon XML customization - whether workbook has custom UI (customUI14.xml)

next-actions.action: Export frmStockEntry UserForm code (.frm) and ThisWorkbook module for complete codebase coverage
Delete dead code modules: Module1, Module2, mod_Config_Test
Fix mod_SheetSetup local MASTER_PWD to reference mod_Config.MASTER_PWD
Add Workbook_Open event handler to initialize mod_Config and verify sheet structure
Create mod_TestHarness with test procedures for mod_StockEngine calculations
Resolve mod_Budget: either create BUDGET sheet or disable budget functions
Resolve mod_StockCalculations: either create StockLedger sheet or redirect to ARTICLES
Implement mod_SyncBridge stub functions (IsSyncComplete, GetSyncProgress, GetSyncError)
Standardize Public keyword across all modules (modNavigation, mod_ReceiptTag, mod_Utilities)
Add XML docstrings to all public procedures

warnings.warning: NEVER modify mod_Config constants without verifying thesis compliance. D=1546, ROP=205.6, SS=200, Q*=176, LT=2 are ground truth values from the case study.
NEVER remove sheet protection without re-protecting in the same execution path. Orphaned unprotected sheets are a data integrity risk.
mod_StockEntry_Logic is 831 lines and heavily interconnected. Any changes must be tested with full smoke test before deployment.
The workbook uses Dropbox/OneDrive sync. Always copy to $env:TEMP before making changes, then copy back.
MASTER_PWD is visible in VBA code. Anyone with access to the file can read it. Consider obfuscation if security is required.
Approval workflow has no role verification - any user can call ValidateByComptable or ApproveByDirecteur directly.

do-not-touch.item: mod_Config constants: SHEET_*, DOC_TYPE_*, MASTER_PWD, WORKING_DAYS_PER_YEAR, OBSERVATION_DAYS, VERSION
mod_StockEntry_Logic CANON_* constants: CANON_ROP=205.6, CANON_SS=200, CANON_QSTAR=176, CANON_LT=2

safe-to-modify.item: mod_SheetSetup line 4 - replace local Const MASTER_PWD with mod_Config.MASTER_PWD
mod_Budget - either create BUDGET sheet or mark as inactive
mod_StockCalculations.UpdateStockLedger - either create StockLedger sheet or redirect

phase.name: Unit Tests
phase.description: Test pure functions in mod_StockCalculations, mod_Utilities, mod_StockEngine with known inputs

phase.name: Integration Tests
phase.description: Test module interactions with mock data
phase.test: SyncTransactionInternal with valid SKU, type, qty, price -> success
SyncTransactionInternal with invalid SKU -> error handling
SecureWriteTransaction with valid data -> row written to MOUVEMENTS
LogTransaction with action and ref -> row written to AUDIT_LOG

phase.name: Entry Point Tests
phase.description: Test all 35 entry points with valid and invalid inputs
phase.test: ApplyInventoryHeatmap -> conditional formatting applied to ARTICLES

cross-agent-protocol.rule: On session start: read erp-project-context.xml FIRST before any code analysis
Before code change: check dependencies in call graph to identify affected modules
After code change: update affected sections in erp-project-context.xml
Before session end: regenerate this file (erp-agent-handoff.xml) with current state
Version bump: increment context version when any mapping changes
File naming: erp-{type}-v{version}.xml for versioned context files
Conflict resolution: last-writer-wins with diff log in .omc/logs/
Always use VBScript for VBA manipulation (PowerShell COM has reliability issues with VBA)
Always work on copy in $env:TEMP, then deploy to project folder
Never commit changes without explicit user approval
